description: In the product launch checklist, move the complete `### User Feedback Collection` subsection from under `## Post-Launch Monitoring` to under `## Beta Testing`, placing it after the complete `### Bug Reporting` subsection and before `### Feature Feedback`. Preserve the moved subsection exactly, including its checklist, table, and fenced archive snippet. Leave the `### User Feedback Exceptions` decoy heading and the quoted archive mention of `### User Feedback Collection` untouched.
